topIngredients.name: Shea Butter
topIngredients.benefit: High-concentration emollient that repairs very dry body skin

topIngredients.name: Oat Extract
topIngredients.benefit: Soothes sensitive and reactive body skin

topIngredients.name: Sunflower Seed Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Lightweight oil that absorbs quickly without residue

verdict: eos Shea Better delivers on its lightweight promise with a non-greasy shea formula that absorbs in seconds. The vanilla cashmere scent is luxurious for the price. Ideal for normal to moderately dry skin.
